truthNote: This artifact packages the validated CLI run recorded in docs/progress/DEMO_VALIDATION_2026-03-22.md. It does not invent a new transaction or claim a fully autonomous onchain settlement flow beyond what was already verified.

environment.mode: CLI human+agent surface against the simplified backend

steps.purpose: Confirm backend health and chain posture before work begins.
Read recent onchain jobs and verify receipt-backed history.
Inspect visible provider supply before negotiation.

steps.command: DEALRAIL_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 node dist/cli.js vend "automation benchmark report" --budget 0.12 --hours 24 --json
steps.purpose: Create a negotiation session and rank offers from the same curated supply catalog.
Bind the autonomous operator path back to onchain proof surfaces.
